final_answer: Source records indicate an unresolved tax ID and vendor master alias link, as confirmed by SRC-65B725086F96-CTL. The policy (SRC-65B725086F96-POL) mandates that execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact action boundary. Escalate for resolution of the tax ID and vendor master alias link before execution.
